不曉得大家有沒有過一個疑問...
為什麼別人的手機拍出來的照片比較漂亮？
是用哪一隻手機？
用哪一個 App 修圖？
好想請他幫我拍照哦...等想法

⭐️漂亮照片不求人⭐️
只要用 iPhone 內建的「照片」App 就可以調出漂亮的濾鏡😊
跟著影片中的步驟，你也可以修出屬於自己的美麗照片唷❤️

1.到「照片」裡挑選一張照片
2.選擇「編輯」
3.點按「濾鏡」-「鮮艷」
4.再點「調整」-「自動」
5.最後再來個「暈邊」

完成以上步驟，就可以得到一張色彩鮮豔明亮的照片啦!
是不是很簡單呢？趕快挑一張照片來試試看吧!!

#############
以下歡迎大家留言分享自己喜歡的濾鏡或是分享跟著影片修完的成品唷😘

#燦坤五甲店AppleShop
#漂亮照片不求人

📱 iOS 26.1 更新來了！Apple Intelligence 終於支援繁體中文啦 🎉
這次更新超有感～AI 功能全面開放中文使用者，快來看看有哪些亮點👇

✨ Apple Intelligence 繁體中文重點功能：
🔹 書寫工具：幫你改寫、潤飾、摘要郵件或備忘錄，文筆再也不煩惱！
🔹 即時翻譯：通話、FaceTime 都能中英互譯，跨語溝通零距離。
🔹 影像樂園（Image Playground）：輸入文字就能生成插畫、貼圖，支援中文描述超方便。
🔹 Genmoji：自己創造專屬表情符號，聊天更有個人風格。
🔹 相片搜尋：輸入自然語句就能找出想要的照片。
🔹 Safari 智慧摘要：快速整理重點，不用再滑到天荒地老。
🔹 通知與郵件 AI 整理：自動摘要、優先顯示重要訊息。

⚙️ 小提醒：
📲 需升級 iOS 26.1 並將語言設為「繁體中文（台灣）」
🔋 模型需額外下載（建議 Wi-Fi＋充電中進行）
📱 僅支援部分新款 iPhone（如 iPhone 15 Pro 系列以上）

🍎 WWDC 2025 開幕啦！Apple 這次帶來超多重磅更新，從全新的 Liquid Glass 視覺風格到 AI 功能大升級，果粉們準備好了嗎？🔥

----------

📱 iOS 26
– 全新 Liquid Glass UI，視覺升級
– Apple Intelligence 智慧功能（支援繁中＋即時翻譯）
– Messages 支援聊天室背景、Apple Music 推出 AutoMix
– Photos、貼圖、翻譯全面強化
✅ 支援：iPhone 11 以後

----------

🌐 iPadOS 26
– 視窗自由縮放、多工操作像 macOS
– 全新 Preview App 支援 Apple Pencil
– 引入 AI 翻譯、Genmoji、Image Playground
✅ 支援：iPad mini 5、iPad 8、iPad Air 3、iPad Pro 11”/12.9” 等

----------

💻 macOS Tahoe 26 
– Liquid Glass 視覺統一 iOS/iPadOS
– AI 功能整合 ChatGPT、即時翻譯、Genmoji
– Spotlight、iPhone Mirroring、生產力工具大提升
✅ 支援：M1 系列與 2019 年後的 Mac 裝置

----------

⌚️ watchOS 26
– 全新玻璃感 UI、智慧健身助手 Workout Buddy
– 手勢操作＋Smart Stack 情境提示
– 錶面、來電、無障礙功能全面強化
✅ 支援：SE 2、S6 以後、Ultra 系列

📱 iPhone 新機全解析
今年的 iPhone 三大陣營，直接幫你分清楚：
🍏 iPhone 17
* 6.3 吋單一尺寸，五種新色（紫、綠、藍、白、黑）
* A19 晶片效能爆升，遊戲續航一次到位
* 螢幕 120Hz + 3000 尼特，戶外也看得一清二楚
* 4800 萬雙相機，還能錄 4K 60fps
* 新的自拍鏡頭 1800 萬，人物居中、團體照都能搞定
👉 最適合一般用戶，簡單一句：全能、好用、價格最划算！

💎 iPhone 17 Pro / Pro Max
* 航太鋁金屬一體成形設計，散熱更穩定
* A19 Pro + VC 均溫板，效能與溫控兼具
* 最長 37 小時續航，20 分鐘快充 50%
* 三顆 4800 萬像素鏡頭，8 倍光學變焦，等同口袋裡的專業相機組
* 支援 ProRes RAW、Log 2、GenLock，手機就能拍電影級影片
👉 專業玩家的首選，拍片、剪片、打遊戲都沒在怕。

🌬️ iPhone Air
* 最輕薄：5.6mm、165g，拿著像沒拿一樣
* A19 Pro + 新 C1X + N1 晶片，續航最高 27 小時
* 超瓷晶盾 2 前後雙強化，抗刮抗裂更耐操
* 4800 萬主相機 + 1800 萬前鏡頭，夜拍、HDR、雙向錄影都穩
* 僅支援 eSIM，更簡潔有型
👉 追求個性與輕便感的人，非它莫屬！

✨ 一句話總結
Air 是 個性、Pro 是 專業、17 是 性價比。
這代 iPhone，總有一款對味！🔥📱

小預算，大保障｜為什麼越來越多人選擇加購裝置保險？

💬 手機一摔、螢幕碎裂、進水當機，是不是光想就心痛？ 現在越來越多使用者在購機時選擇「加保」， 用一點點費用，換來長期的安心與保障。

💡 加購保險的 5 大好處
1️⃣ 意外有保障，不怕臨時破財
手機摔到、螢幕裂了、進水壞機這些狀況很常見， 有保險就能大幅減少維修支出，只需少額自付額就能處理好。
2️⃣ 維修流程更快、更安心
加保後遇到問題不用自己找維修點， 會有專屬通路或快速維修流程，省時又省力。
3️⃣ 使用更放心，降低風險壓力
不管是出差、旅遊，或小孩使用手機， 都不用每天提心吊膽怕摔壞。
4️⃣ 部分方案還含竊盜保障
像 Just Care 類型的保險， 手機被偷、被搶都有機會理賠，保障更全面。
5️⃣ 小預算換長期保障
每月幾十元起，就能享受長達 2～3 年的維修與延保服務。

🔍 一句話總結
用小額預算，買到使用安心、維修便利、風險可控。

reviews.author: sophia wang
reviews.text:
因冷氣汰舊換新之故刷新我對服務品質的新眼界，在燦坤五甲門市因緣際會遇到熱心服務且深具專業素養的家電副理洪得祥先生，經由他巨細靡遺的解說與以客為尊的貼心服務，讓我們如願以償購買到理想冷氣，更難能可貴是他個性平實不浮誇上進有禮，我不由想👍👍👍，謝謝你的優質服務💯

(Translated by Google)
My experience of replacing my old air conditioner has broadened my horizons. At the Tsann Kuen Wujia store, I had the pleasure of meeting Mr. Hung Te-hsiang, the enthusiastic and highly professional assistant manager of home appliances. His meticulous explanations and customer-centric service helped us successfully purchase our ideal air conditioner. What's even more commendable is his down-to-earth, unpretentious, ambitious, and polite personality. I can't help but give him a thumbs up! 👍👍👍 Thank you for your excellent service! 💯

reviews.author: 李小梅
reviews.text:
真心推薦來apple燦坤五甲店，請指名育誌購買，服務態度非常好，也很細心講解，第一次使用蘋果的消費者，我強力推薦育誌。

(Translated by Google)
I highly recommend Apple's Wujia store, and specifically ask for Yuzhi to purchase from them. Their service is excellent, and they explain things very carefully. For first-time Apple users, I strongly recommend Yuzhi.

reviews.author: 王家宜
reviews.text:
服務人員態度非常良好，竭盡全力協助我解決問題，耗費了兩個半小時終於拿到新手機了，感動🥹！

The service staff were very helpful and did their best to assist me in resolving the issue. It took two and a half hours to finally get my new phone. I'm so touched!

reviews.author: 靛夏
reviews.text:
接近關門時間才進去買風扇，最後在一位老人家店員的推薦下買了小寶小寶～很好用，非常感謝他的熱情推薦！

(Translated by Google)
I went in to buy a fan close to closing time, and finally bought a Xiaobao fan on the recommendation of an elderly shop assistant. It works very well, and I am very grateful for his enthusiastic recommendation!

reviews.author: 殺手
reviews.text:
今天到五甲店購買 Apple Watch，因為是第一次使用，原本不太熟悉操作，還好有 Apple 專員張先生耐心教學，從配對到基本功能都一步一步詳細說明，過程中非常親切又有耐心，讓我很快就上手了！整體體驗很好，之後有需要還會再來，也很推薦大家來這裡找他服務！

(Translated by Google)
I went to the Wujia store today to buy an Apple Watch. Since it was my first time using one, I wasn't very familiar with the operation, but thankfully Mr. Zhang, an Apple specialist, patiently taught me. He explained everything step-by-step, from pairing to basic functions. He was very friendly and patient throughout the process, and I quickly got the hang of it! The overall experience was great, and I'll definitely come back if I need anything else. I also highly recommend everyone to use his services here!

My car remote control battery had expired, and the sales assistant, Li Shitian (027077), was incredibly helpful in replacing it. She even proactively looked for my expired membership and updated my account. She was very friendly and also served other customers simultaneously. I'm extremely grateful! I wish her a bright future!

reviews.author: 牛牛
reviews.text:
請問，為何我爸爸去你們店裡了解Ai眼鏡，你們的店員一個幾萬的東西，解釋也解釋不清怎麼用，也不示範怎麼用，我爸爸請你講清楚一點，開始甩態度，我爸爸叫他也不理會，這種態度你要不要回去投胎？基本尊重都不會，重新回去讀幼稚園吧！

(Translated by Google)
Excuse me, why did your salesperson fail to explain how to use AI glasses, a product worth tens of thousands of yuan, even though it was expensive? They wouldn't even demonstrate how to use them. When my father asked for a clearer explanation, they started being rude and ignored him. With this kind of attitude, do you want to go back to your original birthplace? They don't even have basic respect; they should go back to kindergarten!

reviews.text:

reviews.author: 天晴
reviews.text:
剛好住附近，開幕到現在二十多年的老顧客，店内環境寬敞明亮乾淨，價格實在，家裡的電視.冰箱.印表機.傳真機.洗衣機.冷氣.電話.除濕機.筆電.手機.音響...都這買，實體店保固較放心，有問題反應服務都超熱心真誠，超棒的店！！

(Translated by Google)
I happen to live nearby and have been a loyal customer for over 20 years since the store opened. The store is spacious, bright, and clean, and the prices are reasonable. I buy all my household appliances here, including TVs, refrigerators, printers, fax machines, washing machines, air conditioners, telephones, dehumidifiers, laptops, mobile phones, and stereos. The warranty from the physical store gives me peace of mind, and their customer service is always incredibly helpful and sincere. A fantastic store!!

reviews.author: 龍飛
reviews.text:
感謝黃先生

找了一整天mac mini 如何接3個顯示器

非常幸運正好看到其他客戶的評論

打去立刻專業告知你要購買什麼

其他分店真的好好檢討一下

打去鳳山店一問三不知

還笑嘻嘻的重覆說請google查詢
或是直接告訴你沒有販售這樣的產品

沒有對比就沒有傷害

再次感謝黃先生的專業

(Translated by Google)
Thank you, Mr. Huang.

I spent all day searching for how to connect three monitors to my Mac mini.

I was very lucky to see other customers' reviews.

I called and they immediately and professionally told me what I wanted to buy.

Other branches really need to reflect on their practices.

When I called the Fengshan branch, they knew nothing.

They even jokingly repeated, "Please Google it,"

or simply told me they didn't sell that product.

No comparison, no harm done.

Thank you again, Mr. Huang, for your professionalism.
reviews.reply: 你好，我是黃先生，感謝你的肯定！看到好評論讓我們上班又多了動力！

reviews.author: 盼夢圓
reviews.reply: 感謝你對燦坤五甲AppleShop 的肯定!！

reviews.author: 林麥
reviews.text:
蘋果🍎手機「推薦育誌」

蘋果🍎手機「推薦育誌」

蘋果🍎手機「推薦育誌」

抽空去燦坤看🍎手機，剛好遇到「育誌」的介紹跟解說，真的非常的詳細，原本在猶豫要買17或是17pro，聽了他的講解手機巡航力及實際拍照清晰度、用起來的效果，當下就立刻買手機

育誌幫我查看我手機的部分，也幫我分析我i12的看法，確實我的手機已經換過副廠電池，續航力還是一樣差，也是讓我想換手機的原因之一，另外他對🍎的熱情真的是感受得到，他從i7一路用到i15，真的是了解的很透徹～很讚😎

因為買手機時，遇到快打烊，育誌也是說一定會幫我用到好，手機移轉的部分也是幫我用到好，
還好離開燦坤前，育誌還有過來跟我們說：「如果遇到不懂的，或是有困難都可以問他」，因此先生加了育誌的賴，回家後還真的不小心按到手機鍵，遇到手機移轉失敗，詢問育誌後，育誌也是立刻打電話過來，視訊再教我一次，排除我的疑難雜症👍👍

真的非常感謝❤️❤️
售後服務真的做的很到位👍👍
也謝謝當天鎖門的燦坤同事，真不好意思

謝謝😊

(Translated by Google)
Apple iPhone Recommendation: Yu-Chih

Apple iPhone Recommendation: Yu-Chih

Apple iPhone Recommendation: Yu-Chih

I took some time to go to Tsann Kuen to look at Apple phones and happened to come across Yu-Chih's presentation and explanation. It was incredibly detailed. I was originally hesitating between the iPhone 17 and 17 Pro, but after listening to his explanation of the phone's battery life, actual photo clarity, and overall performance, I immediately bought the phone.

Yu-Chih checked my phone and analyzed my experience with the i12. It's true that my phone already had a third-party battery replaced, but the battery life was still terrible, which was one of the reasons I wanted to change phones. Also, you could really feel his passion for Apple; he's used phones from the i7 all the way up to the i15. They really understand everything perfectly – amazing! 😎

Because it was almost closing time when I bought the phone, Yu-Chih assured me he would make sure I used it perfectly, and he also helped me with the phone transfer process.

Thankfully, before leaving Tsann Kuen, Yu-Chih came over and told us, "If you encounter any problems or difficulties, you can ask him." So my husband added Yu-Chih on his WeChat. When we got home, I accidentally pressed a button on the phone and the transfer failed. After asking Yu-Chih, he immediately called me back and video-called me to show me how to do it again, resolving my problem. 👍👍

I'm so grateful! ❤️❤️ The after-sales service was truly excellent! 👍👍 Also, thank you to the Tsann Kuen staff who locked the door that day; I'm really sorry.

Thank you! 😊
reviews.reply: 育誌有看到評論了，感謝你對燦坤育誌的肯定!

reviews.author: 胡文彥
reviews.reply: 感謝你對燦坤五甲AppleShop 的肯定!！

reviews.author: 陳秀珍
reviews.text:
我很感謝鳳山五甲店的服務專員洪得祥，當我們想看電視時詳細的陪伴介紹，隔一個月後我們再度光臨聯絡他，雖然他放假依然準時在店內全程陪同 選購，讓人賓至如歸的感覺。謝謝。所以我們選購電視及音響產品
再則我們有一台藍光播放機，雖然外觀完整新穎但也近10年他表示可以給原場評估使用性能並幫忙追蹤後續進度。就算無法使用也衷心感謝洪先生的熱忱服務及協助，是一位值得信賴的好員工，相信他是有能力的人。

(Translated by Google)
I am very grateful to Mr. Hung Te-hsiang, the service specialist at the Fengshan Wujia store. He provided detailed assistance and explanations when we wanted to watch TV. A month later, when we visited again and contacted him, he was still on holiday and accompanied us throughout our shopping trip, making us feel very welcome. Thank you. Therefore, we purchased a TV and audio products.

Furthermore, we had a Blu-ray player, which, although in good working order, was nearly 10 years old. He said he could provide an on-site evaluation of its performance and help track its progress. Even if it becomes unusable, we sincerely thank Mr. Hung for his enthusiastic service and assistance. He is a trustworthy and capable employee.
reviews.reply: 得祥有看到了喔！感謝你對得祥的肯定!！

reviews.author: 林小卿
reviews.text:
不懂問男店員，很熱心解說差別在哪？如何選擇👍因為很久以前是會員，但有段時間沒消費，女櫃檯幫查詢，協助恢復會員資料，服務好

(Translated by Google)
I didn't understand and asked the male clerk, who was very helpful in explaining the differences and how to choose. 👍 Because I was a member a long time ago but hadn't made a purchase, the female counter staff helped me check and restore my membership information. Excellent service!

reviews.author: 金Rachel
reviews.text:
賣場空間寬敞明亮，附設汽機車停車場，家電及3C商品種類豐富，感謝一名女性服務專員態度耐心，不怕麻煩協助調貨，有替顧客著想的心，服務熱忱專業

(Translated by Google)
The store is spacious and bright, with parking for cars and motorcycles. It offers a wide variety of home appliances and 3C products. I'm grateful to the female service representative who was patient, helpful, and assisted with restocking despite the hassle. She truly cares about her customers and provided enthusiastic and professional service.

reviews.text:

Excellent service

reviews.text:
感謝張先生！服務態度很親切！會主動詢問買iPad的需求，提供很好的專業知識！

(Translated by Google)
Thank you, Mr. Zhang! He was very friendly and helpful! He proactively inquired about my iPad purchase needs and provided excellent professional knowledge!

reviews.author: Cindy Lin
reviews.text:
五甲apple的專業人員「育誌」先生，服務超專業～非常有耐心的解說與協助確認各式apple裝置‼️ 已經跟育誌先生，買了好幾次apple產品！令人放心！超推薦‼️

(Translated by Google)
Mr. Yu-Chih, a professional at Apple's Wu-Jia branch, provides exceptionally professional service—he patiently explains and assists in confirming the details of various Apple devices! I've purchased Apple products from Mr. Yu-Chih several times already! He's reliable and trustworthy! Highly recommended!

reviews.author: K L
reviews.text:
超大間

(Translated by Google)
extra large room

reviews.author: Shuching Jau
reviews.text:
燦坤五甲店現職的一位經驗老道、超有耐心、超厲害的電氣醫生太讚了！十分仔細地檢查電腦、不厭其煩地說明.....，感謝您！

(Translated by Google)
The experienced, patient, and incredibly skilled electrical technician currently working at Tsann Kuen Wujia Store is amazing! He meticulously checked the computer and patiently explained everything... Thank you so much!

reviews.author: 曾國鎮
reviews.text:
消費前、服務說的很好聽。事後維修售後服務態度超差，打電話去我說你店售後服務真的很差、我只給你店ㄧ顆星、店員真的很囂張、回應我說好啊！那我就回應你吧！

(Translated by Google)
Before the purchase, the service was very enthusiastic. However, the after-sales service was terrible. When I called and told them that their after-sales service was really bad and I would only give them one star, the staff member was very arrogant and replied, "Okay! Fine, I'll respond to you then!"
reviews.reply:
不好意思讓你有不好的體驗！
是購買什麼商品，跟哪一個服務人員讓我們了解一下.

reviews.author: 王勝枝
reviews.text:
鍾先生服務有夠讚！

(Translated by Google)
Mr. Zhong's service was excellent!

reviews.author: 陳志妤
reviews.text:
熱情有禮、貼心服務、各司其職、訓練有素！各項電子生活用品應有盡有、停車場寬闊方便！
燦坤五甲店待客熱情溫馨，超級一級棒！

(Translated by Google)
Warm and courteous, attentive service, everyone performs their duties efficiently, and they are all well-trained! They have a wide variety of electronic and lifestyle products, and the parking lot is spacious and convenient!

The hospitality at Tsann Kuen Wujia Store is warm and welcoming—absolutely top-notch!

reviews.author: 雯
reviews.text:
店長服務親切 主動關心消費者需求
蘋果專業客服人員
認真介紹機款功能及操作 價格也很優惠  順利成交 超推來五甲燦坤買蘋果系列！

(Translated by Google)
The store manager was friendly and proactively showed concern for customers' needs. Apple's professional customer service staff carefully explained the features and operation of the device. The price was also very favorable, leading to a smooth transaction. I highly recommend buying Apple products at Wujia Cankun!

reviews.author: mei maier
reviews.text:
冷氣安裝的小許師傅非常厲害！
也很細心！會詢問我們的安裝需求，不馬虎，很誠懇！！
小細節都有幫我們注意，
比xx電子安裝好非常多！！！

之前在電子買冷氣裝的一塌糊塗，窗口也沒封好……地板也沒舖，
我們還自己用3m防水膠帶加工。

這次在燦坤，家電的葉先生跟林先生服務很迅速，6月旺季結帳後等待安裝只等了2～3天非常快速，
很感謝燦坤的服務！
（櫃檯客服短髮小姐也很熱心哦！忘記看名牌了，是一位短髮女生～）

(Translated by Google)
The air conditioner installer, Mr. Xu, was incredibly skilled!

He was also very meticulous! He asked about our installation needs, was thorough, and very sincere!!

He paid attention to even the smallest details,

much better than the installation at XX Electronics!!!

Previously, the air conditioner I bought from XX Electronics was a complete mess; the windows weren't properly sealed… and the flooring wasn't laid.

We even had to do the work ourselves using 3M waterproof tape.

This time at Cankun, Mr. Ye and Mr. Lin from the appliance department provided very prompt service. Even during the peak season in June, after paying, the installation only took 2-3 days, which was incredibly fast.

I'm very grateful for Cankun's service!

(The short-haired customer service representative at the counter was also very helpful! I forgot to check her name tag, but she was a short-haired woman~)

reviews.author: 林芳
reviews.text:
服務人員快速回覆我的購物需求，協助我了解商品功能和使用方法注意事項🏆🏆🏆交通停車也非常方便📦🏆到燦坤五甲店購物ㄧ級棒🥇🥇🥇🎪🎼🎭🏆🏆🏆

(Translated by Google)
The staff responded quickly to my shopping needs and helped me understand the product functions, usage instructions, and precautions. Transportation and parking are also very convenient. Shopping at Tsann Kuen Wujia Store is fantastic!

reviews.author: Johnson Jiang
reviews.text:
$40/1hr，停車場24小時營業，憑燦坤發票可折抵1小，有10個車位(1個身障車格、2個充電車格、7個一般車格)，出入口皆在五甲二路上，跟隔壁的Times五甲二路是不同停車場。

(Translated by Google)
$40/1hr, parking is open 24 hours, you can get a discount of 1 hour with a Tsann Kuen receipt, there are 10 parking spaces (1 for disabled people, 2 for electric vehicles, and 7 for general vehicles), the entrance and exit are on Wujia 2nd Road, it is a different parking lot from the Times Wujia 2nd Road next door.

reviews.author: 美殊
reviews.text:
敏慧股長，轉資料很仔細，服務熱忱

(Translated by Google)
Section Chief Minhui is very meticulous in transferring information and provides enthusiastic service.

reviews.author: 陳冠佑
reviews.text:
趙啟舜先生介紹的很詳細，也理解我們的需求，推薦合適的商品。

(Translated by Google)
Mr. Zhao Qishun provided a very detailed explanation, understood our needs, and recommended suitable products.

reviews.author: A Hong
reviews.text:
讚讚，介紹詳細，鍾先生服務專業親切。

(Translated by Google)
Excellent! The introduction was detailed, and Mr. Zhong provided professional and friendly service.

reviews.author: Bwei
reviews.text:
客服人員態度差勁👎，自己講話小聲讓人聽不清楚，還亂吼是怎樣，態度相當敷衍，對人的基本尊重都沒有，有夠爛的，這種服務讓人覺得可笑又可悲！

(Translated by Google)
The customer service staff were rude 👎. They spoke so softly that no one could hear them, and then they yelled at people. Their attitude was extremely perfunctory, and they had no basic respect for people. It was terrible. This kind of service is both laughable and pathetic!

reviews.author: 鄭慧芳
reviews.text:
五甲店錦惠服務完善態度輕切
五甲店愉庭耐心回應顧客的提問
兩位服務人員都非常棒

(Translated by Google)
Jinhui at the Wujia store offers excellent service and a friendly attitude. Yuting at the Wujia store patiently responds to customer questions. Both staff members are excellent.

reviews.text:
感謝趙先生讓我在挑選3C的時候提供最有效的建議

(Translated by Google)

多謝趙先生
協助選購筆電，幫忙推薦型號及分析不同的差異點
有耐心的講解

(Translated by Google)
Many thanks to Mr. Zhao for his assistance in selecting a laptop, recommending models, analyzing the differences between them, and patiently explaining everything.

reviews.author: Chia Wei
reviews.text:
服務人員 敏慧股長，介紹適合的原廠配件，讓我小省一筆！

(Translated by Google)
The service staff member, Section Chief Minhui, recommended suitable original parts, which saved me a little money!

reviews.author: yin Chao
reviews.text:
在五甲燦坤購買冷氣
服務人員吳天成先生服務極好
分析清楚解釋滿意
讚～讚～讚

(Translated by Google)
I purchased an air conditioner from Wujia Cankun. Mr. Wu Tiancheng, the service staff member, provided excellent service. He explained things clearly and thoroughly, which was very helpful. Thumbs up!

reviews.author: dolphi dolphi
reviews.text:
最近買冷氣，服務到位，感謝吳天成人員用心解說，師傅也是非常的專業，施工也滿意，來買冷氣可以找他👍👍

(Translated by Google)
I recently bought an air conditioner and the service was excellent. Thanks to Wu Tiancheng for the thorough explanations, the installer was very professional, and I was satisfied with the installation. I highly recommend them when buying air conditioners! 👍👍

reviews.author: Yun T
reviews.text:
想說逛逛筆電，就慢慢開來燦坤，
電腦不懂可以來找「趙先生」，
對我們這些電腦小白來說，
先了解我們需求再給我們建議，
我覺得整體服務過程非常詳細和貼近需求，
覺得讚讚，一個字，推推！

(Translated by Google)
I wanted to browse some laptops, so I strolled over to Tsann Kuen. If you don't know anything about computers, you can ask "Mr. Zhao." For us computer novices, he first understands our needs and then gives us advice. I felt the overall service process was very detailed and tailored to our needs. I thought it was excellent! In short, highly recommended!

reviews.author: Hsu Ching-ya
reviews.text:
感謝趙啓舜先生專業服務

(Translated by Google)
Thank you Mr. Zhao Qishun for your professional service.

reviews.author: Chen Wendy
reviews.text:
114/6/14 更新
朱主權先生、營收李小姐服務超級好！超專業！👍👍👍

114/6/13更新
燦坤6/12夜間電器維修部的先生很讚，還有另一位Brothet的先生，這兩位先生，非常熱心幫我排除障礙，就算非他管區的品牌，依然非常的熱忱，真的這兩位員工很棒🎉🎉🎉

高雄燦坤五甲店-薛錦惠小姐，服務非常好👍👍👍，有熱忱及耐心，非常感恩她願意那麽好的服務客人，處理了很棘手的問題，希望主管及高層看的這位員工，給予該得的薪水獎勵及年終獎金！💕💖

(Translated by Google)
Updated 114/6/14

Mr. Zhu Zhuquan and Ms. Li (Revenue) provided excellent service! Super professional! 👍👍👍

Updated 114/6/13

The technician from the Tsann Kuen night appliance repair department on June 12th was fantastic, as was the technician from Brothet. Both of them were incredibly helpful in resolving my issues. Even though it wasn't a brand they were responsible for, they were still very enthusiastic. These two employees are truly amazing! 🎉🎉🎉

Ms. Xue Jinhui from the Kaohsiung Tsann Kuen Wujia store provided excellent service! 👍👍👍 She was enthusiastic and patient. I'm very grateful that she was willing to provide such excellent service to customers and handle a very difficult problem. I hope the supervisor and senior management will recognize this employee and give her the salary bonus and year-end bonus she deserves! 💕💖

reviews.author: Wu 吳Chi Ming 啟銘
reviews.text:
吳大哥的服務很好 很推

(Translated by Google)
Brother Wu's service was excellent, highly recommended.

reviews.author: 呂鈴心
reviews.text:
趙啟舜先生講解筆電很專業，有問必答，服務很熱忱！

(Translated by Google)
Mr. Zhao Qishun was very professional in explaining laptops, answered all my questions, and provided very enthusiastic service!

reviews.author: 黃定發
reviews.text:
薛錦惠服務很好

(Translated by Google)
Xue Jinhui's service was excellent.

reviews.author: 吳紅燎
reviews.text:
五甲店得祥服務很棒 ，介紹很詳細

(Translated by Google)
The service at Dexiang Store in Wujia was excellent, and the explanation was very detailed.

reviews.author: 陳立鴻
reviews.text:
吳天成讚

(Translated by Google)
Wu Tiancheng praised

reviews.author: 邱弘瑋
reviews.text:
感謝張先生讓我在挑選3C的時候提供最有效的建議

(Translated by Google)
Thank you Mr. Zhang for providing me with the most effective advice when choosing 3C products.

reviews.author: 孫阿民
reviews.text:
辦理蘋果手機的人員,態度差

(Translated by Google)
The staff member handling Apple phone transactions had a bad attitude.
reviews.reply: 很抱歉讓你有不好的感受，昨天什麼時間點來購買的？知道是哪一個服務人員嗎?好讓我們可以找出問題

reviews.author: 林Leo
reviews.text:
感謝張先生，建議我買🍎手機時升級「人為保固」，以前真的有騎車不小心手機噴飛出去的經驗，很替顧客著想，年輕人你會成功的！

(Translated by Google)
Thank you, Mr. Zhang, for suggesting I upgrade to the "human-caused warranty" when I buy the Apple phone. I've actually had the experience of my phone accidentally flying off while riding my bike. You really care about your customers. Young man, you will succeed!

reviews.author: 梁虔慈
reviews.text:
Apple櫃位有一位年輕人很棒，跟他買了一台iPad 還推薦我保Apple Care ，還特別強調 買iPad+原廠筆跟鍵盤都能一起算在保固範圍內，很替顧客設想👍

(Translated by Google)
There was a great young man at the Apple counter. I bought an iPad from him and he recommended Apple Care. He also emphasized that buying an iPad plus the original pen and keyboard would be covered by the warranty. He was very considerate of customers 👍

reviews.author: 老蕭
reviews.text:
熱心服務 讚

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service!

reviews.author: 張哲瑜
reviews.text:
買蘋果產品，找蘋果櫃張sir就對了，絕對給你最佳的服務，即便看個配件也可以介紹很清楚詳細

(Translated by Google)
For buying Apple products, just look for Mr. Zhang at the Apple counter. He'll definitely give you the best service, and he can explain things very clearly and in detail, even if you're just looking at an accessory.

reviews.author: yajun
reviews.text:
Apple 弟弟 介紹Apple產品 解說詳細、不會強迫推銷👍👍

(Translated by Google)
Apple's younger brother introduces Apple products with detailed explanations and no hard selling. 👍👍

reviews.author: hin As
reviews.text:
店員服務親切，不懂的地方他都會詳細說明，未來需再購買電子產品及家電，一定都會來找（育誌）購買！

(Translated by Google)
The staff were very friendly and explained everything I didn't understand. I will definitely come back to Yu-Chih for any electronics or home appliances I need to buy in the future!

reviews.author: 陳嬿淇
reviews.text:
Apple有一位年輕人，服務熱忱、熱情、親切。

(Translated by Google)
Apple has a young man who is enthusiastic, warm, and friendly.

reviews.author: 仁杰許
reviews.text:
五甲燦坤服務態度好，商品齊全、我們家蘋果周邊商品都在這裡買（手機、耳機、筆電等）。

需要買蘋果相關商品，都可以去找（育誌），育誌服務非常好，很有耐心回答你的需求並且幫你積極處理問題，專業知識也很足夠。

挑選蘋果商品，育誌會依客人需求做建議，不會強迫推銷哦！ 非常讚的年輕人。

(Translated by Google)
Wujia Cankun offers excellent service and a wide selection of products. We buy all our Apple accessories here (phones, headphones, laptops, etc.).

For any Apple-related products, you can go to (Yuzhi). Yuzhi provides excellent service, patiently answers your questions, actively helps resolve issues, and has ample professional knowledge.

When choosing Apple products, Yuzhi will offer suggestions based on your needs and won't pressure you to buy anything! A truly admirable young person.

reviews.author: jeff Huang
reviews.text:
今天到店，一位張先生服務非常親切，印象深刻值得嘉獎👍👍

(Translated by Google)
I visited the store today, and Mr. Zhang provided exceptionally friendly service, which left a deep impression and deserves praise. 👍👍

reviews.author: Jerry Yang
reviews.text:
服務態度極差 過去問一顆喇叭 店員馬上拿庫存叫我買 但我只是（看） 結果被兇 總之服務態度欠佳

(Translated by Google)
The service was extremely poor. I once asked about a loudspeaker, and the clerk immediately brought out stock and told me to buy it. But I was just looking, and I was yelled at. In short, the service was terrible.

reviews.author: 涵涵
reviews.text:
11/28是在9:00多快打烊的時候進去的
想說看一下電腦 女店員也很認真的介紹電腦的功能跟一些細節 後面決定要買 店員小姐叫我們先站在櫃檯旁邊等一下 他去拿電腦
才過沒幾分鐘
某位穿燦坤背心的阿姨要推銷我們兩個辦燦坤聯名卡 說來這邊我請學姐幫你們辦
啊劈裡啪啦講一堆 也沒聽的很清楚就要人家辦…？
連我們兩個都還沒同意 申請的單子就先勾好勾滿
感受超差 真的要辦也不會找這種的
後面聽到我們沒有要辦 臉直接變⋯⋯
同是服務業 真心覺得如果沒有人辦也不是沒原因

要特別強調那位帶我們看電腦的女店員（有戴眼鏡
像他這樣子很有耐心詳細的介紹說明 我們不到20分鐘就決定買了😻不然本來想說先看看而已
一顆心是給這位女店員的❤️

(Translated by Google)
I went into the store around 9:00 PM on November 28th, almost closing time. I just wanted to look at the computers. The female sales assistant patiently explained the functions and details. After deciding to buy, she asked us to wait by the counter while she went to get the computers. Just a few minutes later, an older woman wearing a Tsann Kuen vest tried to sell us a Tsann Kuen co-branded credit card, saying, "Come here, and I'll have my senior help you apply." She rattled off a whole bunch of things, which I barely understood, and then she wanted us to apply…?!

Before we even agreed, the application form was already filled up! The experience was terrible. I definitely wouldn't choose this kind of place. When she heard we weren't interested, her face changed completely…! Being in the service industry, I honestly think there's a reason why no one else is applying.

I especially want to emphasize the female sales assistant who showed us the computers (she wore glasses). She was very patient and explained everything in detail. We decided to buy in less than 20 minutes! 😻 Otherwise, we were just looking around. My heart goes to this sales assistant! ❤️

reviews.author: 伍婷莉
reviews.text:
今天去逛燦坤遇到惡劣的台新男業務員，開開心心的去買東西要離開時被業務員攔下說拜託聽他講一下

結果停下後先是告訴我他的工作多辛苦多累站很久從台南來幹嘛的，不知道回什麼只好回了「辛苦了」後竟然嗆我講這種話有什麼用我又沒給他辦卡給他業績？？？
瘋狂情勒說他很辛苦我只要填個資料就好，又不是強迫我刷卡
請問到底有什麼問題？賺不到錢養小孩也賴在客人頭上，小孩是我生的嗎？

兩星是給燦坤店員很棒，但糟糕的業務員只配得到👎👎。

(Translated by Google)
Today I went to Tsann Kuen and encountered a terrible salesman from Taishin. I was happily shopping and about to leave when he stopped me, asking me to listen to his story.

After stopping, he first told me how hard and tiring his job was, how long he stood for hours, and how he came all the way from Tainan. Not knowing what to say, I just replied, "Thank you for your hard work." Then he snapped at me, asking what the point of saying such things was since I hadn't given him a membership card or contributed to his sales.

He was being ridiculous, saying he worked so hard, but all I had to do was fill out some forms; he wasn't forcing me to swipe my card.

What's wrong with him? He can't earn enough to support his child and he blames the customers? Did I give birth to that child?

Two stars are for the excellent Tsann Kuen staff, but the awful salesman only deserves a 👎👎.
reviews.reply:
這邊是燦坤店家，真的很抱歉讓你有這種體驗！
我們馬上詢問台新人員了解情況，有請人員加強並改善辦卡話術的技巧，
會請他們加強教育訓練，再次致歉

reviews.text:
昨天要買一個分享器經店長介紹看到標價3399的覺得不錯，結果結帳時說標價錯誤要5399元，覺得燦坤標價不實，還說員工貼錯了，你店長自己都不知道價錢還亂介紹客人買，結果標價不對說不賣，我真的火大，說那麼大的店標價不實，多了2000誰能夠接受阿，不是買不起而是你們標價亂標，我們不是盤子吧

(Translated by Google)
Yesterday I wanted to buy a router. The store manager recommended one priced at 3399 yuan, which I thought was good. However, when I went to pay, they said the price was wrong and it was 5399 yuan. I felt that Tsann Kuen's pricing was unfair, and they even said the employee put the wrong label on the card. They said the store manager himself didn't know the price and still recommended it to customers. They said they wouldn't sell it to me because the price was wrong. I was furious. I said, "Such a big store, how can you price it wrong? Who can accept an extra 2000 yuan? It's not that I can't afford it, it's that your pricing is wrong. We're not a business!"

reviews.author: Lan Hu
reviews.text:
去年四月買了二台𥦬型冷氣A台在一次下大雨水從邊框一直滲水進來叫處理也不來
今年二台都不敵颱風A台的邊框封板被吹走了 B台也從邊框滲水 真不知裝冷氣的師傅有無技術可言 以為裝了冷氣就沒事 傻眼

(Translated by Google)
Last April, I bought two air conditioners. Unit A, after a heavy rain, water seeped in from the frame, and no one came to fix it. This year, both units succumbed to a typhoon; Unit A's frame panel was blown off, and Unit B also started leaking from the frame. I really don't know if the air conditioner installer had any skills. He thought that installing air conditioners would solve everything, but I'm dumbfounded.

reviews.author: 任羿
reviews.text:
因為需要買GoPro打電話到其他店說這家有Hero13 Black就來買了，來之前有打電話先確認是否有貨，店員很細心先幫忙留起來在櫃檯。

到了之後店員也很專業介紹了適合的記憶體，整體來說感覺是一家貨品齊全且空間大的燦坤。

(Translated by Google)
I needed to buy a GoPro, so I called other stores and they said this one had the Hero 13 Black, so I came here to buy it. Before coming, I called to confirm availability, and the staff were very considerate and held it for me at the counter.

Once I arrived, the staff were also very professional in introducing suitable memory modules. Overall, it felt like a well-stocked and spacious store.

reviews.author: 捏捏貓
reviews.text:
吃粽子吃一吃突然想到三年多前買了一台筆電，越想越氣，真後悔當時沒有即時留負評。買完回家，什麼防毒軟體都裝好了，大概一個禮拜過後，打字打一打才無意間發現右邊數字鍵盤的數字「7」壞掉，要按比較大力才會出現，而且有時候又按過頭，變成連按好幾個「7」，誇張到不行，從來沒看過這種荒謬至極、可笑的產品瑕疵，笑死。又突然想到又要吃好幾天的粽子，越想越氣，差點沒拿球棒把筆電砸爛，不過還好，理智又贏了這一回合，筆電目前安好。數字「7」依舊時不時在打字時發癲，雖然可以改用上排的數字鍵盤，但只要想到整個鍵盤中存在著一個毫無用處的按鍵，整個火就會上來。

(Translated by Google)
While eating zongzi (sticky rice dumplings), I suddenly remembered a laptop I bought over three years ago. The more I thought about it, the angrier I got, and I really regretted not leaving a negative review immediately. After buying it and bringing it home, I installed all the antivirus software, and about a week later, while typing, I accidentally discovered that the number "7" on the right-hand numeric keypad was broken. It required quite a lot of pressure to activate, and sometimes I would press it too hard, resulting in several "7"s being pressed in a row—it was ridiculously absurd! I've never seen such an absurd and laughable product defect before; it's hilarious. Then I suddenly remembered that I'd have to eat zongzi for several more days, and the more I thought about it, the angrier I got. I almost smashed the laptop with a baseball bat, but thankfully, reason prevailed this time, and the laptop is currently fine. The number "7" still occasionally acts up while typing. Although I can switch to the top row of the numeric keypad, just thinking about having a completely useless key on the entire keyboard makes me furious.

reviews.author: 樂
reviews.text:
到五甲暢坤購買冷氣，最初第一次致店看冷氣，店員就這樣走來走去
沒人來服務來詢問就算了
第二次到店才有店員來接待

後續完成購買有提到舊機汰換可以上網申請補助若有問題都可以回來找店家協助處理！

今日到櫃檯請小姐服務，後續列印完
請我們去冷氣區找服務員處理
結果到那邊將近10-15分 完全沒有人來協助處理
等到我們不開心才有男員工來詢問= =

真的是浪費時間 ！爛

(Translated by Google)
I went to Changkun Air Conditioner in Wujia to buy an air conditioner. The first time I went to the store to look at air conditioners, the staff just walked around; no one came to serve me or ask any questions. It wasn't until my second visit that a staff member came to assist me.

After completing the purchase, they mentioned that I could apply for a subsidy online to trade in my old unit, and that I could return to the store for assistance if there were any problems.

Today, I went to the counter and asked a saleswoman for service. After printing everything out, they told us to go to the air conditioning section to find a staff member. However, after almost 10-15 minutes there, no one came to help me. Only when we were unhappy did a male employee come to inquire.

It was such a waste of time! Terrible!
reviews.reply: 不好意思讓你有不好的體驗，我們會討論如何改進人員及人力不足的問題

I still prefer the warmth of the south. I bought this product because of the warm welcome from Ms. Chen Minhui, a service staff member. She is a very caring person. She helped me get the product from another place. Usually, the product is just shipped directly from the source to my address, but Ms. Minhui specially sent it back to her own company to check it before sending it to me. This small gesture shows her thoughtfulness and care. Thank you!
reviews.reply: 有幫你轉達給陳小姐囉！他也知道是你喔！很感謝你對我們的支持！

reviews.author: stardust19722000
reviews.text:
今天晚上家人到五甲燦坤想看洗衣機，家人有預算考量，想買萬元以下的洗衣機，結果服務人員（男）居然跟家人說說如果你壞掉不打算修理的，可以看這區（萬元內），家人聽到傻眼，萬元以下難道就不是錢嗎？萬一故障就不能維修？要直接丟掉？那你們可以直接貼個pop告知顧客，這些洗衣機壞掉就報廢，無法修理的。我也是服務業出身的，每個顧客都有預算考量，所以一間店面的商品有平價的，也有高價位的，就是希望可以盡量讓每個客人挑選適合自己的產品，這位服務人員不要拐者彎來瞧不起顧客，奇檬子真的很差，之前我到五甲燦坤購買Apple 的筆電，服務人員真的很有耐心（他是燦坤的店員，不是Apple的人員），所以家人想買電器我第一時間就叫她去燦坤買，結果被洗臉，感受真的很差。

(Translated by Google)
Tonight, my family went to Tsann Kuen in Wujia to look at washing machines. They were budget-conscious and wanted one under NT$10,000. However, the male salesperson told them that if they didn't plan to repair it, they could look at this section (under NT$10,000). My family was stunned. Does that mean anything under NT$10,000 isn't money? What if it breaks down and can't be repaired? Are they just going to throw it away? Why don't you just put up a sign saying these washing machines are unrepairable and beyond repair? I also come from a service industry background. Every customer has a budget, so a store has both affordable and high-priced items. The goal is to help each customer choose products that suit their needs. This salesperson shouldn't try to look down on customers in such a roundabout way. He was really rude. Previously, when I went to Tsann Kuen in Wujia to buy an Apple laptop, the salesperson was very patient (he was a Tsann Kuen employee, not an Apple employee). So, when my family wanted to buy appliances, I immediately told them to go to Tsann Kuen, but they were treated rudely. It was a really bad experience.

reviews.author: 麗秋黃
reviews.text:
本來想說算了不說，但想到還是生氣。
親戚她要買2台洗衣機放在頂樓給房客用，所以託我去幫她看看，我去了燦坤詢問店員，結果他叫了一位年長的男性店員，接著我詢問洗衣機的折扣及現在的活動。因為我看的是便宜的機型，感覺他很瞧不起買便宜貨的人，可能我也穿的隨便，所以他的態度很差，一副我買不起的樣子。

結果就是跑去家樂褔買，價錢有些還比燦坤打折便宜，加上還有9折活動，五甲家樂褔服務態度也很好。

(Translated by Google)
I initially thought of just letting it go, but I still got angry.

My relative wanted to buy two washing machines for her rooftop tenants, so she asked me to help her look. I went to Tsann Kuen and asked a salesperson, but they called over an older male employee. I then inquired about discounts and current promotions. Because I was looking at cheaper models, he seemed to look down on people buying inexpensive items. Perhaps because I was dressed casually, his attitude was very poor, as if I couldn't afford them.

In the end, I went to Carrefour. Some of the prices were even cheaper than at Tsann Kuen, plus there was a 10% discount. The service at Carrefour Wujia was also much better.
reviews.reply: 不好意思造成你感受不好，已請該服務人員改善，期待你再度光臨

reviews.author: Lui Yaya
reviews.text:
家裡很多電器用品都在這邊買，感覺一直都還可以，不過昨天買了一個1688的電鍋說要調貨，今天通知到貨去取的時候櫃檯有一男一女在幫客人結帳，於是我們一家站在後面排隊等候，等了許久，忽然後面員工拿了別的客人要結帳的物品直接交給櫃台的那位男生，櫃檯的男員工直接要幫排我們後面的男客人結帳，把我們當空氣，我拿著取貨單等了很久還被員工直接幫客人插隊，很令人傻眼！以後再也不會去燦坤了，尤其是你們這間，雖然櫃檯小姐有道歉，但又不是她讓別人插隊，另一個櫃檯男的完全沒有，要去這間的客人自己想清楚，會被當空氣，員工素質需要加強

(Translated by Google)
We buy many of our home appliances here, and they've always been pretty good. However, yesterday I bought an electric cooker from 1688, and they said they needed to restock it. Today, when we went to pick it up, there was a man and a woman at the counter helping other customers with checkout. So, my family and I stood in line behind them. After waiting for a long time, suddenly, an employee behind us took another customer's items and handed them directly to the man at the counter. The male employee then immediately tried to check out the male customer behind us, completely ignoring us. I had been waiting for a long time with my pick-up slip, and an employee was still cutting in line for another customer! It was unbelievable! I will never go to Chan Kwan again, especially this branch. Although the female employee apologized, it wasn't her who made someone cut in line. The other male employee didn't apologize at all. Customers who want to go to this branch should think carefully; you'll be treated like you're invisible. The staff's professionalism needs improvement.

reviews.author: Li Jian Yee
reviews.text:
員工服務品質真差，今天去取昨天買的商品，從進門到站在櫃台前等待都快五分鐘都沒人來接待，兩個櫃檯人員居然只服務一組客人，而且其他員工也沒想要前來接待的意思。
另外…貴公司只接待手上有商品的客人嗎？我們在哪裡等那麼久，居然跳過我們，要幫有商品的客人結帳！

(Translated by Google)
The staff service is terrible. I went to pick up the items I bought yesterday, and from the moment I entered until I stood at the counter waiting for almost five minutes, no one came to serve me. The two counter staff only served one group of customers, and the other staff didn't seem inclined to help either.

Furthermore… does your company only serve customers with items in their hands? We waited so long, and they skipped us and went to check out customers with items!

reviews.author: 法瑪諦
reviews.text:
非常討厭亦步亦趨的銷售人員

(Translated by Google)
I really dislike salespeople who are overly compliant.

reviews.author: Addy Wu
reviews.reply: 很感謝你對我們的支持！

reviews.author: 張嘉賢
reviews.text:
停車時間只有15分鐘！！！
如果你沒有在店內消費，當你停車超出5秒鐘
就要繳停車費！！！
五甲店是高額費用停車場
強迫消費者就算你在店內沒有買東西，只有諮詢電氣用品功能
也至少一定要消費30元停車費的感覺！！！

(Translated by Google)
Parking time is limited to 15 minutes!!!

If you don't make a purchase in the store, you'll have to pay a parking fee if you park for more than 5 seconds!!!

This Wujia store has an expensive parking lot, forcing customers to pay at least 30 yuan for parking even if they don't buy anything and only inquire about electrical appliances!!!

reviews.reply: 很感謝你的評論！

reviews.author: 晨希
reviews.text:
感謝張弟弟的推薦，用了一陣子覺得穿透效果及穩定度都很棒，如有朋友需要，會再請他們至五甲店找您購買。

(Translated by Google)
Thanks to Zhang for the recommendation. After using it for a while, I found the penetration and stability to be excellent. If any of my friends need it, I will ask them to buy it from you at Wujia Store.
reviews.reply: 有跟張店員告知，他很開心喔，感謝你的星級支持！！

reviews.author: 盧雅萍
reviews.reply: 很感謝你的星級評分！

reviews.author: 胡睿炎
reviews.text:
大到大型家電，小到充電線。東西總是調來調去，家電賣了其他售後沒什麼專業態度，委外廠商更是沒再要求。裡頭基本上就是賣，其他不關他們事或者能拖就拖能，維修能說到讓你自己送修，因為若關他們的事，他們會太忙，有家電保險先跟你說原廠不會讓你換，之後判定再說。說專業沒專業，之前的燦坤去哪兒了？其實若再這樣下去，店裡只需要3個人，一個結帳，一個糊弄你買東西，一個糊弄你不能修買新的。

(Translated by Google)
From large home appliances to small charging cables, items are constantly being moved around. After-sales service for appliances is unprofessional, and there's no further accountability from outsourced manufacturers. Basically, their only focus is selling; everything else is either none of their business or they drag their feet. When it comes to repairs, they tell you to bring it in yourself because they're too busy to handle it. If you have appliance insurance, they'll tell you the original manufacturer won't replace it, and they'll assess the situation later. They're utterly unprofessional. Where did the Tsann Kuen brand go? If this continues, the store only needs three people: one for cashiering, one to trick you into buying things, and one to sell you new items because they can't repair them.

reviews.author: O23
reviews.text:
（我要客訴！！）
本來對五甲燦坤印象很好 家裡的一台電視就是在這裡買的，這次想說要買給阿嬤看的。
去了兩次燦坤要選電視、昨天本來是要去付錢的～
結果又遇上同一個服務員（女生戴著眼鏡，有年紀的女生長頭髮）
後面想說又遇見另外一個男生服務員跟他說我們想要那台電視，結果那個男生又叫那個女生來 無言！
那個女生的態度有夠差 愛理不理很沒禮貌 一臉臭臉？
請他改進好嗎不然就不要做服務業。
花錢不是看你臉色吧？
直接跟我老公說不要買了 去別間燦坤吧！

後面直接去瑞隆燦坤買電視，明明就是服務員 跟那個女生就差很多，這邊的店員還比較有禮貌，在等待付款的時間跟櫃台聊天的同時跟他們抱怨了一下那個女生～～！！

(Translated by Google)
(I want to complain!!) I originally had a very good impression of Tsann Kuen in Wujia. We bought our TV there, and this time I wanted to buy one for my grandma.

I went to Tsann Kuen twice to choose a TV. Yesterday, I was going to pay...

But I ran into the same saleswoman (a woman with glasses and long hair, older than me).

Then I met another male saleswoman and told him we wanted the same TV, but he called the woman over again. Speechless!

That woman's attitude was terrible. She was indifferent, rude, and had a sour face.

Please ask her to improve, or she shouldn't be in the service industry.

I'm not paying to be treated this way!

I told my husband directly not to buy it and to go to another Tsann Kuen store!

Later, I went to Tsann Kuen in Ruilong to buy a TV. The saleswoman there was so different from that woman. The staff there were much more polite. While waiting to pay, I chatted with the counter staff and complained about that woman!

reviews.author: YU Chen
reviews.text:
買個電視，說下次二點送，已經3點半還沒送，我也不知道是送去哪裡，打電話問，電視部阿姨說要回電話也不知道回去哪裡，燦坤真的越做越爛，這次買完差不多要退卡了，差勁👎。

忘了說，你們真的都沒有改進，之前買的電視也是發生一樣的問題，上次是飛利浦，我認為你們不要只知道回覆訊息，那位弟弟的真誠道歉我也感受到了，但是已經兩次了，你們是否應該針對這個配送問題好好改善。

(Translated by Google)
I bought a TV, and they said it would be delivered at 2 PM, but it's already 3:30 PM and it still hasn't been delivered. I have no idea where it's been sent. I called to ask, and the lady in the TV department said she'd have to call back but didn't know where it was either. Tsann Kuen is really getting worse and worse. I'm almost going to cancel my subscription after this purchase. Terrible!


I forgot to mention, you guys haven't made any improvements. The same problem happened with the TV I bought before, last time it was a Philips. I think you shouldn't just keep replying to messages. I appreciated the young man's sincere apology, but this has happened twice already. Shouldn't you be addressing this delivery issue properly?

reviews.author: 陳1111
reviews.text:
有位中年人 臉很臭 服務態度極差

(Translated by Google)
There was a middle-aged man with a very sour face and extremely poor service attitude.

reviews.author: MXE JM
reviews.text:
這個月會員招待會 去買刮鬍刀 門市取貨，櫃檯收銀人員，很親切，很 nice ，幫忙順利買到優惠又好用的商品 謝謝

I went to the members' event this month to buy a razor. I picked it up at the store, and the cashier was very friendly and helpful, assisting me in successfully purchasing a discounted and useful item. Thank you!

價錢公道～服務人員～好～家電總類多～

reviews.author: 李秉倫
reviews.text:
以前購買經驗都不錯
這次門市人員非常不專業
先打電話詢問印表機型號，說要到門市訂且付三成訂金

現場到門市問，說要調貨一週左右
且已付三成訂金

隔天晚上打來說 沒貨
叫我去退訂金

打客服 去問 說查的結果 沒有說停產
還叫我打回門市問
申訴就是客服，那我打去幹嘛

踢來踢去

這整個過程真的很不專業

(Translated by Google)
Previous purchasing experiences have been good.

This time, the store staff were extremely unprofessional.
They first called to inquire about the printer model, saying I had to order it at the store and pay a 30% deposit.

When I went to the store, they said it would take about a week to restock, and I had already paid the 30% deposit.

The next evening, they called to say it was out of stock and told me to come back for a refund.

I called customer service, and they said their checks showed no indication of discontinuation.

They even told me to call back to the store. The complaints section is just customer service; what's the point of calling them?

They just kept passing me around.

This whole process was incredibly unprofessional.

reviews.author: 文武鄭
reviews.text:
資訊齊全，員工態度與資訊培訓的很好，詢問與需求都能幫你詳細解說，讓我買到最符合自己要求的商品、要燦坤買東西推薦來這裡專業人員多，服務態度又很好，同樣都是燦坤培訓出的人員，一樣的問題與需求在草衙某家燦坤，只會一直回答你看你自己的需求，態度又愛理不理，一肚子回家，上班敷衍了事等領錢而已

(Translated by Google)
The information was comprehensive, and the staff were very helpful and well-trained. They explained everything in detail to answer my questions and help me buy the products that best suited my needs. I highly recommend buying from Tsann Kuen here. They have many professional staff and excellent service. In contrast, at another Tsann Kuen store in Caoya, even though the staff were all trained by Tsann Kuen, they would just keep saying "It depends on your needs" and their attitude was indifferent. I went home feeling frustrated, thinking they were just going through the motions at work and waiting to get paid.

reviews.author: 文
reviews.text:
服務態度很好，從進門口就會有接待人員詢問需求，與專業跟很好的資訊！然後去滿足我的需要，同樣都是燦坤，這家態度與資訊好太多了，前天一樣去某燦坤一肚火回家，問什麼三不知，詢問要求與資訊，只會告訴我看我自己的需求，那我到底是在問什麼？
我都已經看好商品詢問這三間評價與功能，還是一樣回答看我需求需要哪一個…他們都差不多-.- 然後一樣的問題來到五甲店，直接有專業的人跟你說，一一詳細說明，到完全貼切我的需求！ 如果直接來這間，就不用拖一天購買了，還一肚子火回家  非常推薦來五甲店詢問購買，有專業人員真的差很多！

(Translated by Google)
The service was excellent. From the moment I entered, a staff member greeted me, inquired about my needs, and provided professional and helpful information. They then went to meet my requirements. Even though both were from the same store, this one was so much better in terms of attitude and information. The other day, I went to another store and came home furious. They were clueless about everything, and when I asked about my needs, they just told me to look at my own requirements. What was I even asking?

I had already looked at the products and asked about the reviews and features of these three stores, and they all gave the same answer: "It depends on your needs." They were all pretty much the same. Then, I went to Wujia Store, and there were professionals there who explained everything in detail, perfectly matching my needs! If I had gone directly to this store, I wouldn't have spent a whole day buying something and coming home frustrated. I highly recommend going to Wujia Store for consultation and purchase; having professional staff makes a huge difference!

(Translated by Google)

I'm so grateful for his helpful explanations on how to use it. He was so kind and even helped me install the TV and carry it onto my motorcycle. I wish him booming business and a promotion and raise! I'll definitely come back to him when I need to buy more home appliances. 👍👍👍

reviews.author: 簡Jian
reviews.text:
前天下午，我幫家人去現場詢問傳真機，有問到2台，決定要買哪一台後，拍照傳給家人

當天晚上，家人到現場要買，結果店員卻說這台沒有傳真功能？
並介紹一台貴快3千多的傳真機
一直洗腦我家人說，他介紹的這台耗材較便宜！

我請家人先不要買，我回來再研究看看
後來我上網查墨水，明明就我當初要買的那台，墨水較便宜

隔天家人再次去購買當初選的那台，卻說廠商停產了？？？
是在耍人嗎？停產的東西還擺在店裡幹嘛？

前面幾次購買經驗都很好，很喜歡店員的態度
但這次的購買經驗，真的太傻眼了，只能奉上一顆星

(Translated by Google)
The day before yesterday afternoon, I went to the store to inquire about fax machines for my family. We saw two models and decided which one to buy, sending them photos to my family.

That evening, my family went to buy it, but the salesperson said the model didn't have a fax function?

They then introduced a fax machine that cost almost 3,000 yuan more, constantly trying to convince my family that the consumables for the model they recommended were cheaper!

I asked my family not to buy it yet, and to research it further when I got home.

Later, I checked the ink online, and it was clear that the ink for the model I originally wanted was cheaper.

The next day, my family went back to buy the model they had chosen, but they were told the manufacturer had discontinued it???

Are they playing games with us? Why keep a discontinued product in the store?

My previous buying experiences were all great; I really appreciated the salesperson's attitude.

But this buying experience was truly shocking. I can only give it one star.

(Translated by Google)
It's terrible. Did the maintenance personnel do what they said they would do? After they finished the work, they didn't even help the customer to test whether the product was working properly. They just did it hastily and without any professionalism. After the maintenance, the problem was still the same, the same, the same. Are they just trying to get by?

I bought 100,000 yuan worth of home appliances, and they installed them at my home. Afterwards, when I wanted to move the appliances, they completely ignored me.

I've seen this kind of service before, and I will never come back. No more business with them!

reviews.author: micky chang
reviews.text:
店員特別的可怕，有種緊迫盯人的感覺，讓人感受出他非常缺業績，站過來問是在找什麼什麼嗎，說對，然後他就說這一區都是，然後就沒下文了，一直站在旁邊，什麼也不介紹，就一直站在旁邊，怪可怕的，等到自己決定下好離手的時候，他就出聲了，說決定是這個了嗎，然後就說幫你拿到櫃檯結帳，結帳時隱約有聽到結帳有要 key銷售人員，嗯？我得到什麼服務跟介紹了嗎，這樣就拿到我這筆業績？我可以自己拿到櫃檯結帳的，沒有不給業績，就是感受比較不好
主要是因為五甲店真的是品項比較多，展示出來的東西也比較多，那不然我會在瑞隆店買

(Translated by Google)
The salesperson was particularly intimidating, giving off a suffocating vibe, making it clear they were desperate to make sales. They'd come over and ask if I was looking for something, and if I said yes, they'd say the whole section had it, and then nothing more. They'd just stand there, offering no introduction, which was quite unsettling. Only when I'd decided to leave did they finally speak, asking if I'd decided on this one, and then offering to take it to the counter for me. While paying, I vaguely heard them asking for a key from the salesperson. Huh? Did I receive any service or introduction? And they just took it to the counter myself; they didn't withhold my commission, it was just a bad experience.

The main reason I bought it was because the Wujia store really had a lot more items and displayed more products; otherwise, I wouldn't have bought it at the Ruilong store.

reviews.author: GEE Chen
reviews.text:
我進去要買一個巨集功能滑鼠，店員熱心服務帶我去找，看了兩個商品價格$590以及%7XX，我選擇590那一個，但在結帳時卻顯示$690，我只是提問為什麼會是跟上面不一樣的價格(以為只是會員與否的價差結果也不是)，後續得到結果是他們貼錯標籤，拜託一下這是有上鎖的商品，為何會這樣子出包?重點是出包的時候只叫我等，已經有點不高興了，這時跑出一位要叫我辦卡的阿姨，我就說了不用，還要一直問一直問一直問，感受非常差勁

最令人傻眼的一個問題，這滑鼠根本沒有巨集功能，一天內沒收到回覆將對貴公司提出檢舉。

給一顆星我都覺得太多了

(Translated by Google)
I went in to buy a macro-enabled mouse. The clerk was very helpful and showed me where it was. I saw two items priced at $590 and 7XX%, and I chose the $590 one. However, at checkout, it showed $690. I asked why the price was different (I thought it was just a difference between membership and non-membership, but that wasn't the case). It turned out they had mislabeled it. Please, this is a locked item! How could they make such a mistake? The main problem is that when this happened, they just told me to wait, which was already annoying. Then, an older woman came out trying to sell me a membership card. I said no, but she kept asking and asking, making my experience extremely poor.

The most baffling thing is that this mouse doesn't have macro functionality at all. If I don't receive a response within a day, I will file a complaint with your company.

Giving it even one star seems too much to me.

reviews.text:

reviews.author: 嚴大和
reviews.text:
要買衛星導航，結果測試展示機時，一直跟你說室內不能用GPS，跟他說有模擬功能，還回你說還是不能導航，結果功能確認可以後，口氣就變的很差；要測試其他功能時，就說那個導航都有，不是很想給人測試，態度差到讓我直接走人° 我再也不會來這家！

(Translated by Google)
I wanted to buy a satellite navigation system, but when they tested the demo unit, they kept telling me that GPS couldn't be used indoors. Even when I told them it had a simulation function, they still said it couldn't navigate. But after confirming that the function worked, their tone became very rude. When I tried to test other functions, they said that all the navigation features were there and they didn't really want to test it for me. Their attitude was so bad that they told me to just leave. I will never come to this store again!

reviews.author: Vivian Wang
reviews.text:
進去五分鐘找不到我要的東西就出來結果沒消費沒消磁不能出來 問店員店員說停車場外包 一進來就要算錢 但是她還是有拿消磁的QR code給我消磁 但是停車場已經夠小了 兩邊進出的地方還用鐵欄杆圍起來 用一個閘門  停車場小還圍成這樣 還進去就要收錢 以後應該不太會有機會再去！

(Translated by Google)
I went in for five minutes but couldn't find what I wanted, so I came out. Since I hadn't made a purchase or deactivated the parking ticket, I couldn't leave. When I asked the staff, they said the parking lot was outsourced and they charged me as soon as I entered. However, they did give me a deactivation QR code to deactivate the ticket. But the parking lot is already small enough, and the entrances on both sides are fenced off with a single gate. Given how small the parking lot is and how they charge you to enter, I probably won't have the chance to go there again!

reviews.author: Karen Wu
reviews.text:
打電話告知訂購東西已到，也在電話中告知服務人員，我會晚點過去拿，他也說好

結果下午去的時候，把單子給另一個小姐，小姐找了很久，中間也有出來問一次男生服務員「東西是否到了？」，男服務員也告知「有，在客訂區」，結果又找了一陣子，出來之後告訴我說「抱歉沒有看清楚，還沒有到貨」
我整個瞬間傻眼耶！那打給我說到貨意思是什麼？
打給我那個男生也說「早上是我打的」
我反問「我不是有說晚點過來嗎？你也說沒問題啊！」
給我的感受極差！感覺就是把東西誤給別人，不敢說，然後道歉也只是表面上的道歉，絕不會有下一次消費，感受太差！處理太差！準備處理退貨！

(Translated by Google)
I called to let them know my order had arrived and that I would pick it up later, which they agreed to.

However, when I went to pick it up in the afternoon, I gave the order to another lady. She searched for a long time, even coming out once to ask the male staff member, "Has the item arrived?" The male staff member said, "Yes, it's in the order area." After searching for a while longer, he came out and told me, "Sorry, I didn't check carefully, it hasn't arrived yet."

I was completely dumbfounded! What did they mean by telling me it had arrived?

The male staff member who called me said, "I called this morning."

I retorted, "Didn't I say I'd come later? You said it was fine!" My experience was terrible! It felt like they mistakenly gave the item to someone else, were afraid to admit it, and their apology was just a superficial one. I will never buy from them again. The experience was awful! The handling was terrible! I'm going to process a return!

(Translated by Google)
When I bought it, they smiled and said they'd bring it back for an exchange if there was a problem. But when I actually brought it back for an exchange, their attitude was terrible. They even shook their heads at me. If they have a problem with their head, why don't they go see a doctor? Being a manager gives them the right to be so grumpy. Learn from the employee you specifically asked to help with the exchange; their service is ten times better than yours.

reviews.author: 林婷婷
reviews.text:
5/27在這邊訂了冰櫃，隔沒幾分鐘到了家樂福發現一模一樣的冰櫃才8828元，還有集點換鍋子活動，但是想說燦坤有送保鮮罐就算了。
6/1冰櫃送來時，送貨員只有送冰櫃沒有送保鮮罐，到門市蓋保證書章，跟門市人員領取保鮮罐，在現場等了10幾分鐘，店員才告知書面顯示保鮮罐已經在6/1隨冰櫃送達，我還想回說我家有監視器畫面可以證明送貨員並沒有附上嘞……
在燦坤年消費14萬，什麼還元金都沒有，不如去家樂福買，還會給你無期限限制的家樂福點數，而且燦坤連5天的保固期都要凹，明明是6/1送達，保固章卻蓋5/27……

(Translated by Google)
I ordered a freezer here on May 27th. A few minutes later, I arrived at Carrefour and found the exact same freezer for only NT$8828. They even had a points-based redemption program for pots and pans, but I figured since Tsann Kuen included food storage containers, I'd be happy.

When the freezer arrived on June 1st, the delivery person only brought the freezer, not the food storage containers. I had to go to the store to get the warranty stamp and collect the containers from the staff. I waited there for over ten minutes before the staff informed me that the document showed the containers had been delivered with the freezer on June 1st. I even wanted to say that I have CCTV footage proving the delivery person didn't include them…

I spend NT$140,000 annually at Tsann Kuen and get nothing in return. I should have just bought it at Carrefour; they give you unlimited Carrefour points. And Tsann Kuen even cuts the 5-day warranty period. It was clearly delivered on June 1st, but the warranty stamp says May 27th…

reviews.author: 文一川
reviews.text:
有沒有負評五顆星啊？對於五甲店的  停車拍照車牌辨識系統  實在是給予負評最高，沒有一次感應正確，顧客已經到出口，因為車牌感應不對無法離開，又要下車，又要請賣廠人員操控才能離開，是識別系統太差，不是燈光太強，要不就角度不對，沒有一次是正確無誤的，不是數字不對，就是字母缺角，不只顧客不方便，更是增加賣場人員的負擔。太差勁了！

(Translated by Google)
Does anyone have a five-star negative review? This is the worst I can give to the parking camera and license plate recognition system at Wujia Store. It never got it right. Customers were already at the exit, but couldn't leave because the license plate recognition was faulty. They had to get out of the car and ask the store staff to operate it. The system is terrible – either the lights are too bright, or the angle is wrong. It's never been accurate; either the numbers are wrong, or the letters are missing a corner. It's inconvenient not only for customers but also increases the burden on the store staff. Absolutely awful!

reviews.author: John Williamson
reviews.text:
I bought a small computer a while back and it had an issue with powering itself off suddenly. I came to this shop for help as I needed the computer for my studies and essay writing. I dropped it off with a young man on the second floor who said he needed a few days with it to find out what was going on. Long story short, it had a bad hard disk (maybe damaged in post), the staff replaced the drive, checked everything, and as requested by myself, applied new thermal paste to the CPU, upgraded the memory and installed Windows 11. The man was very professional and friendly. He knew I needed Windows 11 in English not Chinese and told me that "he would sort it". As a customer what more do you need to hear?? A few days later, I got a call and the computers been running perfectly ever since!
Five star rating from me! A completely stress free experience.
reviews.reply: 感謝您的支持

reviews.author: 呂芋頭
reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) I don't want to go there again. We know that delivery time requires cooperation from both parties, but they keep changing it and expect us to accept it. It's awful.

(Original)
下次都不想去了，送貨時間需要雙方配合，我們知道，但是一再更改，還要我們接受，爛透了。
reviews.reply: 您好，這個位置是燦坤數位館（家電館在另一邊，因為我們兩邊是獨立作業）經查我們目前應該沒有待配送商品，尚未處理，如果您有數位商品的問題，煩請來電門市喔！

reviews.author: QQ Q
reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) I'm so grateful to the store staff for helping me order the phone, but when I picked it up at the store, they said they needed to open it to check if it was working properly, and then they opened the box... My brain couldn't process it! 😫😫😫 Couldn't they have asked me first if I wanted to open the box myself? My old phone is several years old, and a new one isn't cheap, so all the joy of unpacking a gift is ruined! 😭😭😭 I've been feeling really nauseous ever since I got home. Why did something so happy have to turn out like this? Why should you be the one to open something I spent tens of thousands of dollars on?! 😭😭😭

(Original)
很感謝門市人員幫忙訂購手機，但到貨到門市拿手機時，人員說要開封手機確認手機功能是否正常，然後就拆封手機了……我的腦袋來不及反應啊😫😫😫是不是能先詢問客人是否想自己拆封手機，舊手機用了幾年一支手機又這麼不便宜，拆封禮物的愉悅感都沒有了😭😭😭回家後一直很嘔嘔嘔嘔嘔嘔嘔嘔嘔嘔嘔啊，到底為什麼這麼開心的事會變成這樣，明明就是我花了幾萬塊買的東西為什麼是由你來拆啊😭😭😭
reviews.reply: 您好：剛才有接到您的來電，我們會特別要求人員注意，謝謝您寶貴的意見。

reviews.author: 郭jacky
reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) My old server had been running for nine years and would occasionally lag, so I bought a new one from Tsann Kuen. I'm so grateful to Ms. Cai and a handsome young man for their help with the setup – 100% positive service! 😊

(Original)
舊的伺服器用了9年了，時不時卡卡的來燦坤買一台新的，感謝服務人員蔡小姐跟一位帥哥幫忙協助設定～服務100分讚啦😊
reviews.reply: 感謝您的鼓勵，我們會持續努力。

reviews.author: 林佑姍
reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) Terrible.

I went to buy AirPods 4 and asked the salesperson if the basic model had adjustable noise cancellation. The salesperson said yes. However, I couldn't try them on beforehand, so I couldn't test them.

After leaving the store, I tried them on and discovered they didn't have noise cancellation at all. Therefore, I wonder if the salesperson, a man with black-rimmed glasses, intentionally deceived me? A pair of headphones costing over four thousand yuan is already quite expensive, and I didn't say I wouldn't buy the five-thousand-yuan active noise-canceling model. However, the salesperson's ambiguous and contradictory answers influenced my purchase and violated my consumer rights.

After checking online, I found that items must be in brand-new condition to be returned. Therefore, I had to disconnect the headphones to find out if they had noise cancellation, making a return impossible.

Please think twice before coming to this store.

At least think twice before buying headphones here.

(Original)
超爛
去購買AirPods4，詢問店員基本款可不可以自己調降噪，店員說可以。然後不能試戴所以也無法先實驗。
結果離開店面之後試戴才發現根本沒有降噪功能，所以請問該名黑框眼鏡男店員是否有蓄意欺騙顧客之行為？一個耳機四千多塊本身就不是很便宜了，何況又沒說五千的主動降噪款不買，但是該店員模稜兩可顛倒是非的回答影響我的消費行為並且侵犯到我的消費權益。
上網查詢之後發現售出的商品要全新狀態才能退貨，故拆耳機連線之後才會知道有沒有降噪，這樣根本不可能退。
請三思再來這間店。
至少請三思再來買耳機。
reviews.reply: 您好，很抱歉喔，我們已經針對銷售人員進行處份。

reviews.author: 胡品淳
reviews.reply: 感謝您的支持與鼓勵

reviews.author: 小臣臣
reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) Today I went to buy an ASUS VZ27EHF monitor. I went a second time to ask about the tripod, which wouldn't bend. The service staff were very professional and explained how to install it. After that, I discovered my computer couldn't connect to the HDMI port and needed an adapter. I went a third time to take a picture of the power strip on the back of my monitor and showed it to the service staff. They initially helped me find an adapter, but then they noticed a blurry image of the power strip on the bottom of my monitor and said it should be an HDMI port. I checked at home and it wasn't. I went a fourth time, but the service staff still didn't believe me. I insisted on buying the adapter, and they thought I was being naive. Now I have photographic evidence; the power strip isn't the right one. What do you mean by this?

(Original)
今天第一趟去買華碩VZ27EHF，又去第二趟去詢問腳架沒辦法彎，後來服務人員很專業告訴我怎麼安裝，後來搞好，發現電腦沒辦法插HDMI，需要買轉接頭才能用，第三趟拍好主機後面插座，給服務人員看，一開始有幫我找轉接頭，後來又看了我手機主機後面下面插座有個模糊，他說那應該是HDMI 插座，我回家後看了不是，又跑了第四趟去服務人員還是不相信，我很堅持要買轉接頭，以為我憨憨的很堅持，現在有照片為證，這插座就不是，請問你們？？？？？？？？？
reviews.reply: 很抱歉，未能及時處理，如果還沒辦法，歡迎來電門市喔。

reviews.author: Xiu zhen Lin
reviews.reply: 感謝您的鼓勵，我們會要求同仁持續努力

reviews.author: Emerson H
reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) On December 3rd, I purchased a mobile phone from your company. The service specialist there was incredibly helpful, explaining the product thoroughly (they were very familiar with the products the company sells and their corresponding promotions). The after-sales service was even better than five stars.

I finished purchasing the phone that afternoon, and that evening I took a friend back to your store. The same service representative from noon was there.

She was a service specialist with a ponytail, no glasses, and pink manicure. She spoke calmly, kindly, and patiently.

I'm very grateful to her. Having such a helpful employee helps retain many customers.

Thank you to her, and thank you to Cankun.

(Original)
12/3號，再貴公司購買手機，公司的服務專員，細心的分享產品（對公司販售的產品熟悉、公司相對應的活動內容也非常清楚）
購機之後的售後服務，比五顆星還多。
當天下午購機完畢，晚間又帶友人過去貴店，服務員也是中午的那位服務員。
是一位綁馬尾沒戴眼鏡美甲是粉紅淡粉紅系列的服務專員，說話語速平穩親切有耐心。
非常謝謝她，公司有這樣的服務員，能留住很多客人。

謝謝她，也謝謝燦坤。
reviews.reply: 感謝您的支持與鼓勵。

reviews.reply: 您好，目前搭配的台新燦坤聯名卡，可以提供多項優惠現金折扣，包含購買蘋果商品，也能適用，如果您能多花一點時間了解，台新燦坤聯名卡應該也是一個不錯的選擇喔。

If I have to send everything directly from the manufacturer, I might as well just buy it online directly from the manufacturer. Why come to a physical store?

希望賣東西的時候可以跟客人說一下東西有問題七日內要拿來退換貨 買了個鍵盤兩個禮拜內有問題拿來要換結果無法 下次不會再來燦坤消費了
啥都要送原廠我直接網路跟原廠買就好了來實體店幹嘛
reviews.reply: 您好，雖然商品自購買日超過7天，如果商品有問題，一樣可以轉送回原廠處理喔！

reviews.author: Bing Tony
reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) I only went to this 3C store because I wanted to buy an LCD monitor; it's rare to find one with even a few display models. However, the communication with the salesperson left me very unhappy.

After looking around for about 15 minutes, a salesperson came over to ask me questions. I wanted to find a monitor with the quality and screen calibration that suited my preferences, so I slowly compared most of the display models. The salesperson didn't explain the specifications of each model in detail, and finally just said, "You're not here to find flaws in a monitor."

I felt he was impatient with me. I wasn't just looking and not buying; what good would it do him to chase me away?

(Original)
為了買液晶螢幕，難得有一間有一點展示品的3C賣場才去貴店，但跟店員之間的溝通令我非常不樂。

reviews.author: 台江/蔡秀梅
reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) At the Tsann Kuen Yonghua Road No. 2 store, I went to inquire about and retrieve my free gifts, and asked for help on how to upload information using my phone to obtain a 2-year warranty (I shopped on the evening of April 23rd, forgot to take back the free gifts, and bought a stereo and speakers). During this time, I found the service specialist, Mr. Lin Yusheng, to be incredibly patient and tirelessly helping me solve problems. Because my phone couldn't upload the information smoothly, he used his laptop to assist. Despite all the issues, he remained kind and friendly to me. Thank you! Such a great employee, a wonderful young man.


On April 24th, from 4:20 PM to 5:45 PM, there were also three handsome young men at the checkout counter on the first floor. Their friendly smiles and warm greetings to customers were truly a blessing to Tsann Kuen. Thumbs up! 👍👍👍

(Original)
在燦坤永華路二店、去店裡詢問、並取回贈品及請教用手機上傳資料以取得2年保固，（4/23晚上購物、忘記帶回贈品、購買列表機、音箱），上述這時段，發現服務專員林育聖先生、真難得的超、超、超有耐心、不厭其煩的幫忙解決問題、因爲手機無法順利上傳⋯就用筆電協助處理、這中間種種問題～對這位ㄚ桑、仍和顏悅色⋯感謝你～這樣不錯的員工、很棒的年輕人。
112/04/24下午16:20～17:45、這時間內、還有在1樓結帳櫃台3位年輕帥哥，親切問候、招呼顧客的*親切笑容*、不愧是燦坤之福～給你們點👍👍👍
reviews.reply: 謝謝您對店內同仁支持～～

reviews.author: 顏小憲
reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) I entered the store around 9:10 am, and I noticed that the staff seemed to be trying to shoo me away. None of the dozen or so staff paid any attention to me. When I was looking at the Wi-Fi devices, no one came over to introduce or explain them to me. Since I didn't see the model I wanted, I left.

(Original)
進去店裡約9點10分左右，就看到服務生開始電燈貴感覺在趕客人，十幾個服務生沒人要理我，在看Wi-Fi機時也沒人要過來介紹和說明，沒看到我要的機種我就離開了。
reviews.reply: 你好～門市關門時間為21：30，會在21:15分之後沒有客人的區域會先關閉櫃位電源，今日上班人員也沒有10幾個人，若2 F人員疏乎介紹，會再進行改進～

(Original)
只能說垃圾，今天我到這裡來買無線耳機，我問店員羅技的g-435有沒有其他的配色，結果找都沒找，直接隨手指了旁邊的g-533，態度甚至像把我當傻子似的，當時整個人都火大了
reviews.reply: 你好～因同仁知道目前店內無g-435黑色庫存，故直接指向為羅技黑色g-535看是否可以接受這款，若有對應不周，會再進行檢討～

reviews.author: Chêng Hūi popiepopie
reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) Mr. Yan from the repair department on the second floor deserves high praise. Despite his young age, his service is prompt and enthusiastic, and he patiently explains all customer questions.

Last night around 8 PM, I went to him for help with my laptop power cord. Mr. Yan determined it needed to be sent to the manufacturer, which would take 2-3 weeks, or we could purchase a new one. However, all the stock was in other cities, and with the weekend approaching, even getting a replacement wouldn't solve our immediate problem. We were worried because we didn't have any other devices at home for our child's online learning when Mr. Yan suddenly had a brilliant idea. He remembered some old spare parts (handed over from a former colleague) lying in the warehouse. He went to get them and used them to connect to the power cord we brought. To our surprise, it worked perfectly, solving the problem smoothly. We are very fortunate and grateful to have encountered such an excellent person. 👍

(Original)
二樓維修部的顏先生值得好好嘉許，年紀輕輕，服務迅速有熱忱，面對客戶的疑問也都一一耐心解說。

昨晚八時許帶著筆電電源線前去求助，顏先生判斷需送原廠處理, 屆時將耗時 2-3 週，或者重新購置新品，惟庫存均在外縣市，加上週末將至，調貨亦無法解燃眉之急，正因家中並未有其他裝置能提供孩子進行線上學習而苦惱之際, 顏先生突然靈機一動，想起躺在庫房多時的舊備品（前同事交接）, 便跑去取來拿來套用在我們帶來的電線，沒想到剛好可使用，順利解決問題，讓我們很慶幸也感謝遇到這麼優秀的人員。👍
reviews.reply: 謝謝支持～～感謝您對同仁的鼓勵～～

The progress was also poorly addressed, and two different employees gave conflicting information – are they even working in the same place? Did they even contact the manufacturer? reviews.author: HSU JUNG YEH
reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) This is the store we almost always come to when someone in our family needs a new iPhone or to buy other electronics. It's spacious and comfortable to shop in, and the staff don't push sales.

However, last time I bought an iPhone, the staff seemed unsure about the stock of specific models and colors. The first time I asked, they said they only had black and white left… but later they found the color I wanted.

A different staff member checked me out and also explained how to transfer my information and some important notes, so the service was excellent.

The only thing that wasn't great was the credit card sales pitch, which other customers also mentioned. They kept trying to sell me a credit card while I was checking out. I told them I already had a new credit card, but they kept pushing it, and kept guessing my age… asking if I paid the card fees myself…

(Original)
家裡有人要換iPhone和購買3c產品幾乎都會來這家，空間很大逛起來很舒服，店員不會過來一直推銷。

但上次買iPhone時，店員對於型號及顏色的庫存好像不太清楚，第一次詢問時直接說只剩黑白兩色⋯但後來才發現有我要的顏色。
結帳的是另一位店員，同時也教導如何轉移資料和一些注意事項，服務就很好。

唯一不太ok的就是其他客人也有提到的信用卡推銷，正在結帳的時候一直跟我推銷，我有表明已有台新信用卡，但還是一直推銷，然後一直猜我的年紀⋯問我卡費是自己繳的嗎⋯⋯
reviews.reply: 謝謝您的支持！信用卡公司申辦部分，已要求改善。

(I have Who's Call installed on my phone, and I haven't received any missed calls from Tsann Kuen during this time.) So it was supposed to be 7-14 weeks! Who knows? Maybe it'll turn into 7-14 months! I never knew card readers costing just over a hundred yuan could be so high-tech! Hats off to the amazing Tsann Kuen 3C!

(Original)
看來大家都很有維修天荒地老的體驗～

向偉大的燦坤3c致敬！

reviews.author: Pan Viola
reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) I encountered a salesperson with an extremely rude attitude. When I asked about laptops, they asked if we had already looked at them. When I said no, they just opened a webpage and told us to look at them ourselves. If everyone wants to buy something, why do we need a salesperson?

At first, I thought it was okay to look at the webpage, not wanting to inconvenience the salesperson, so I asked if I could continue looking at the laptop while they went about their work. But they asked if I had a phone and told me to use my own!

I know the store's computers are business laptops, but I only need to browse the web. They don't need it now, or they really can't let me use it myself. They could have looked at the laptop with me from the beginning. My thoughtful inquiry was met with disrespect; the experience was truly awful!

Back to the most basic point: not being able to directly explain the product is unprofessional. These days, many companies simply use a tablet to explain their products. Even without a tablet, you can use a brochure. Nobody told you to use a business laptop, and certainly not to use your phone. I will never go to this store again! 😡😡

(Original)
遇到態度超差的店員，詢問筆電竟然問我們有沒有看好了，說沒有竟然就只會開網頁叫我們自己看，如果大家都看好再去買幹嘛需要店員呢
一開始還想說沒關係網頁看一下，看一看怕耽誤人家店員其他工作，問她這電腦可不可以讓我繼續看，她去忙她的就好，結果竟然問我有沒有手機叫我用我自己的手機看
我知道店裡電腦是公務機，但我只滑網頁，你們現在也沒要用到，或者真不能讓我自己用，一開始可以在旁邊跟我一起看，我體貼你們工作做的詢問反而不被尊重，感受真的很差！
回到最基本一個問題，產品沒辦法直接介紹就是不專業，現在多少公司介紹產品根本直接拿個平板跟你介紹，真的沒有平板也可以用DM，沒有人叫你用公務機，更不該叫客人用手機自己看，完全不會再去這間店😡😡

📱一起重新認識 iPhone！
我們解鎖了iPhone的實用內建功能：

📷 照片搜尋與整理

🔓 更換桌布/鎖定畫面小技巧

今天的小教室好熱鬧～
從照片App快速找照片，到更換桌面、鎖定畫面小工具的小巧思，還有內建放大鏡實用妙用，大家開啟後應該這次來才發現，原來手機裡藏了這麼多貼心功能！

有小夥伴說：「我用iPhone這麼久，今天才知道可以這樣用耶！」就是這樣一句話，讓我們更有動力分享更多有趣、實用的給大家！🥰🥰🥰

感謝今天每一位參加的學員們，也歡迎下次帶上朋友一起來探索更多📲

在地經營的感動，老朋友的喜悅我們一起分享！

經營在地 10 多年，最珍貴的莫過於和顧客間的情感連結。前天，我們收到一位認識超過 10 年的老朋友，在 LINE 上傳來一則令人振奮的消息：他的女兒 Sunny，榮獲由 Apple 主辦的第 18 屆 iPhone Photography Awards（IPPAWARDS）抽象類第一名！

Sunny 的作品 《Liminal》，拍攝於舊金山家中的衣帽間，那是重新粉刷前最後的粉紅色倩影。她說，這張照片象徵著人生的斷捨離，卸下不適合自己的人事物，才能迎來新的開始。

Sunny 從小受父親影響而愛上攝影，還記得冰箱裡總有爸爸珍藏的底片；如今，她也用自己的視角記錄生命的瞬間。能見證老朋友一家人的成長與榮耀，讓我們深深感受到在地化經營的價值與感動。

Sunny，恭喜你！也謝謝每位支持燦坤 AppleShop 斗六店的朋友，因為有你們，這些故事才如此動人。

如果您剛好是中華電信業者的門號，如果到現在還是無法正常接聽電話，麻煩您可以先開飛航模式再重新關閉試試，或是最快也能重新開機等訊號源恢復即可使用唷！

轉至中華電信公告，從7月31日晚間6點至8月1日清晨6點，範圍為新北及基隆部分區域進行設備維護，影響對象為部份計時制、ADSL、光世代等上網用戶。

中華電信提醒，為提供更穩定的網路服務，於上述期間進行設備維護作業，將可能有短暫時間無法上網使用狀況，請於施工時間過後再重新連線，繼續使用網路服務。DHCP用戶請於施工過後重開設備連線，或請釋放原有IP重新取得即可。

中華電信稍早回應，今晨7點左右已排除障礙，若用戶手機仍無法正常使用，可嘗試「打開飛航模式再關閉」，或直接重開機恢復連線。至於此次大規模語音通訊異常的具體原因，後續有通訊問題也請在洽詢中華電信：0800-080-123

一位老顧客晚上的求救Line📱

今天發生了一件讓我很有感觸的事情。

傍晚六點多，一位認識很久的熟客阿姨突然傳LINE給我。

她說：

「易生，我妹妹的手機好像被控制了，完全不能用，你有沒有辦法幫忙看看？」

其實這支手機不是iPhone，而是一支三星Android手機。

但即使如此，阿姨第一時間想到的不是品牌客服，也不是原購買店家，而是直接聯絡我。

大約晚上八點左右，阿姨和妹妹就一起來到門市求救。

看到手機的當下，我原本心想：

「應該只是一般廣告軟體，找到後刪除就好了。」

結果事情比想像中還麻煩。

手機畫面不停跳出廣告，甚至連操作都非常困難，關掉一個視窗又立刻跳出下一個。

有些廣告還故意用驚悚標題來嚇人。

對於天天接觸手機的人來說都已經很困擾，更別說是不熟悉3C產品的長輩。

我先把Wi-Fi和行動網路全部關閉，避免惡意程式持續連線。

接著一個一個檢查後台程式、一個一個刪除可疑軟體。

最後終於找到罪魁禍首：

📍 FlashScrub Clean

它會在背景持續自動啟動，並且不斷推送廣告內容。

即使關閉視窗也會再次跳出，讓手機幾乎無法正常使用。

（真的不誇張，我還有影片存證。）

⸻

最讓阿姨擔心的其實不是手機壞掉。

而是手機裡面存著許多重要聯絡人和資料。

她曾經詢問過電信業者，得到的建議是：

「直接重灌手機。」
「推銷防駭守門員行動版。」
但這樣裡面的資料可能全部消失。

對長輩來說，那些聯絡人、照片和回憶，遠比手機本身還重要。

還好最後花了一些時間慢慢排查。

成功把惡意程式移除。

手機恢復正常運作。

資料也完整保留下來。

看到阿姨和妹妹終於鬆了一口氣，我自己也覺得很開心。

⸻

這篇文章並不是想批評三星或Android系統。

事實上，Android有許多優秀的功能和優點。

只是近年來Play商店偶爾仍會出現一些包裝得很像正常工具的App。

對於不熟悉手機操作的長輩來說，很容易一不小心就按到下載。

而這也是我常常推薦長輩使用iPhone的原因之一。

不是因為規格比較強。

而是因為：

✅ 操作邏輯簡單

✅ 權限管理相對直覺

✅ App審核機制較嚴格

✅ 比較不容易誤裝來路不明的軟體

對很多長輩而言，

「簡單、安全、穩定」

往往比規格重要得多。

⸻

最有趣的是，

整個過程中我完全沒有推銷妹妹一定要換iPhone。

反而是姐姐站在旁邊自己說：

「我看妳下次直接買iPhone比較安全啦！」

🤣🤣🤣

有時候最好的廣告，

真的不是廣告。

而是服務。

⸻

謝謝阿姨一直以來的信任。

也謝謝妳們特地送來的小禮物❤️

對我來說，

賣手機只是工作。

幫助顧客解決問題，才是這份工作的價值。

#服務是無價的

⸻

不曉得大家有沒有過一個疑問，為什麼別人的手機拍出來的照片比較漂亮？
是用哪一隻手機？用哪一個 App 修圖？好想請他幫我拍照哦...等想法

⭐️漂亮照片不求人⭐️
只要用 iPhone 內建的「照片」App 就可以調出漂亮的濾鏡😊
跟著影片中的步驟，你也可以修出屬於自己的美麗照片唷❤️

1.到「照片」裡挑選一張照片
2.選擇「編輯」
3.點按「濾鏡」-「鮮艷」
4.再點「調整」-「自動」
5.最後再來個「暈邊」

完成以上步驟，就可以得到一張色彩鮮豔明亮的照片啦!
是不是很簡單呢？趕快挑一張照片來試試看吧!!

以下歡迎大家留言分享自己喜歡的濾鏡或是分享跟著影片修完的成品唷😘

在地經營的感動，老朋友的喜悅我們一起分享！

經營在地 10 多年，最珍貴的莫過於和顧客間的情感連結。前天，我們收到一位認識超過 10 年的老朋友，在 LINE 上傳來一則令人振奮的消息：他的女兒 Sunny，榮獲由 Apple 主辦的第 18 屆 iPhone Photography Awards（IPPAWARDS）抽象類第一名！

Sunny 的作品 《Liminal》，拍攝於舊金山家中的衣帽間，那是重新粉刷前最後的粉紅色倩影。她說，這張照片象徵著人生的斷捨離，卸下不適合自己的人事物，才能迎來新的開始。

Sunny 從小受父親影響而愛上攝影，還記得冰箱裡總有爸爸珍藏的底片；如今，她也用自己的視角記錄生命的瞬間。能見證老朋友一家人的成長與榮耀，讓我們深深感受到在地化經營的價值與感動。

Sunny，恭喜你！也謝謝每位支持燦坤 AppleShop 斗六店的朋友，因為有你們，這些故事才如此動人。

小預算，大保障｜為什麼越來越多人選擇加購裝置保險？

💬 手機一摔、螢幕碎裂、進水當機，是不是光想就心痛？ 現在越來越多使用者在購機時選擇「加保」， 用一點點費用，換來長期的安心與保障。

💡 加購保險的 5 大好處
1️⃣ 意外有保障，不怕臨時破財
手機摔到、螢幕裂了、進水壞機這些狀況很常見， 有保險就能大幅減少維修支出，只需少額自付額就能處理好。
2️⃣ 維修流程更快、更安心
加保後遇到問題不用自己找維修點， 會有專屬通路或快速維修流程，省時又省力。
3️⃣ 使用更放心，降低風險壓力
不管是出差、旅遊，或小孩使用手機， 都不用每天提心吊膽怕摔壞。
4️⃣ 部分方案還含竊盜保障
像 Just Care 類型的保險， 手機被偷、被搶都有機會理賠，保障更全面。
5️⃣ 小預算換長期保障
每月幾十元起，就能享受長達 2～3 年的維修與延保服務。

🔍 一句話總結
用小額預算，買到使用安心、維修便利、風險可控。

【想要買 Apple 的人，給你一個誠實的建議 🍎】
最近常常有朋友問我：「現在值得買 Apple 嗎？還是再等等？」
我的想法是——如果你現在的電腦或平板已經跟不上你的節奏，當然換。但如果只是心裡那個「應該要升級了」的念頭在催你，我有個更划算的路線想讓你知道。
這個月我們屏東門市正在出清一批展示機，目前還剩三款：
💻 MacBook Air M4 15吋（展）→ 特價 $33,915（原 $41,900，省 $7,985）
📱 iPad Air M3 13吋（展）→ 特價 $17,900（原 $26,900，省 $9,000）限12台
📱 iPad Air M2 13吋（展）→ 特價 $14,900（原 $26,900，省 $12,000）限8台
展示機是什麼？就是我們門市裡讓客人試用的機器。硬體規格和全新的完全一樣，只是少了原廠包裝和保固。
說真的，如果你的需求是辦公、上課、創作、追劇，M4、M3、M2 都已經遠超日常所需了。一代跨一代的差異，在實際使用裡很多人根本感受不出來。
那省下來的這筆錢可以做什麼？
可以拿去買配件、買 Apple Pencil，或者——放著。等幾年後你真的覺得「現在這台不夠用了」，拿去舊換新再升級，加上這筆差價當補貼，你的升級成本幾乎砍半。
這才是我會建議自己家人做的選擇。先把眼前這個划算的機會拿下，把省下的錢留著做未來的升級基金。
數量有限，其中好幾款其實快要見底了。

【想要買 Apple 的人，給你一個誠實的建議 🍎】

最近常常有朋友問我：「現在值得買 Apple 嗎？還是再等等？」

我的想法是——如果你現在的電腦或平板已經跟不上你的節奏，當然換。但如果只是心裡那個「應該要升級了」的念頭在催你，我有個更划算的路線想讓你知道。

這個月我們屏東門市正在出清一批展示機，目前還剩三款：

💻 MacBook Air M4 15吋（展）→ 特價 $33,915（原 $41,900，省 $7,985）限5台
📱 iPad Air M3 13吋（展）→ 特價 $17,900（原 $26,900，省 $9,000）限5台

展示機是什麼？就是我們門市裡讓客人試用的機器。硬體規格和全新的完全一樣，只是少了原廠包裝和保固。

說真的，如果你的需求是辦公、上課、創作、追劇，M4、M3 都已經遠超日常所需了。一代跨一代的差異，在實際使用裡很多人根本感受不出來。

那省下來的這筆錢可以做什麼？

可以拿去買配件、買 Apple Pencil，或者——放著。等幾年後你真的覺得「現在這台不夠用了」，拿去舊換新再升級，加上這筆差價當補貼，你的升級成本幾乎砍半。

這才是我會建議自己家人做的選擇。先把眼前這個划算的機會拿下，把省下的錢留著做未來的升級基金。

數量有限，其中好幾款其實快要見底了。

這個月我們屏東門市正在出清一批展示機，目前還剩三款：

💻 MacBook Air M4 15吋（展）→ 特價 $33,915（原 $41,900，省 $7,985）
📱 iPad Air M3 13吋（展）→ 特價 $17,900（原 $26,900，省 $9,000）限8台

展示機是什麼？就是我們門市裡讓客人試用的機器。硬體規格和全新的完全一樣，只是少了原廠包裝和保固。

說真的，如果你的需求是辦公、上課、創作、追劇，M4、M3、M2 都已經遠超日常所需了。一代跨一代的差異，在實際使用裡很多人根本感受不出來。

那省下來的這筆錢可以做什麼？

可以拿去買配件、買 Apple Pencil，或者——放著。等幾年後你真的覺得「現在這台不夠用了」，拿去舊換新再升級，加上這筆差價當補貼，你的升級成本幾乎砍半。

這才是我會建議自己家人做的選擇。先把眼前這個划算的機會拿下，把省下的錢留著做未來的升級基金。

數量有限，其中好幾款其實快要見底了。

07/01–07/31 限定 ‧ 全國電子屏東門市
有問題歡迎私訊我確認庫存，售完即止 🙏

嗨大家好～我是粉絲團小編 💛

先跟大家說聲不好意思喔。可能有人會問：為什麼不能寄貨、不能線上刷卡，甚至到他店刷卡也不行？

其實是因為我們以前遇過詐騙，公司到現在都還很小心。所以訊息裡的各種要求，我們真的沒辦法一一處理，只能請大家來店裡看現貨、現場驗機，覺得 OK 再帶走。這樣對大家、對我們都比較安心。

也真的很感謝願意跑一趟的你們——在地的屏東人、特地從高雄過來的、大老遠從台南來的，還有人在台北、請屏東朋友幫忙驗機再寄回去的朋友。謝謝你們願意相信我們，也謝謝讓我們有機會幫上忙 🙏

先跟大家說清楚這件事，感謝理解，也歡迎來店坐坐～
謝謝大家！
